steps.title: Find each parfait cost
steps.content:
The cost for $18$ parfaits is $70.20$, so divide.
$$\frac{70.20}{18}=3.90$$

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content:
$x$ fruit cups cost $1.60x$. $y$ parfaits cost $3.90y$. The total is $94.20$.
$$1.60x+3.90y=94.20$$

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The equation with $1.60x$ for fruit cups and $3.90y$ for parfaits is the correct model. The answer is D.
